sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 48 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 12.11.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant On the last date following order was passed: 1. To be complied before the next date 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Counsel holds brief for Mr. Qaim Ali Memon and requests for adjournment. However, counsel is directed to come prepared as to the proposed Question No.1 which now stands decided by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. M/s. Millat Tractor Limited Lahore and others (2024 129 Tax 459). To come up on 18.12.2024. In view hereof learned counsel does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
